GER_001.name: Rift Stabilizer Core
GER_001.desc: A crystalline regulator forged from Rift fragments. It steadies wild Mora energy and slows dangerous buildup.

GER_002.name: Harmony Pulse Core
GER_002.desc: A calm-core regulator favored by Harmony Lumorians. Its pulse helps steady the link between Lumorian and Mora.

GER_003.name: Dominion Core
GER_003.desc: A severe command core used by the Purity Order to impose sharper control over Mora in conflict.

GER_004.name: Aegis Node Core
GER_004.desc: A dense protective node that reinforces the wearer's vitality against harsh conditions.

GER_005.name: Riftbite Core
GER_005.desc: A dangerous core that amplifies power while feeding on instability. Coveted by reckless Rift Seekers.

GER_010.name: Whisperleaf Charm
GER_010.desc: A leaf-bound charm said to soften the hearts of wandering Mora.

GER_011.name: Hunter's Sigil
GER_011.desc: A respected hunter mark that seems to draw stronger creatures closer.

GER_012.name: Aura Lantern Charm
GER_012.desc: A glowing charm that preserves fragments of aura when disaster strikes.

GER_013.name: Gloam Thread Charm
GER_013.desc: A shadow-laced charm that hums in the presence of forbidden energy.

GER_014.name: Mercantile Whisper
GER_014.desc: A charm carried by traders who always seem to strike the better deal.

GER_020.name: Mora Scanner
GER_020.desc: A compact scanning device that reads the signature of nearby Mora.

GER_021.name: Rift Compass
GER_021.desc: This compass never points north. It points where the Rift feels closest.

GER_022.name: Tracking Lens
GER_022.desc: A crystal lens that sharpens signs, trails, and subtle traces of Mora movement.

GER_023.name: Echo Drill
GER_023.desc: A forbidden survey tool used to uncover concealed energy nests and unstable pockets.

GER_024.name: Field Siphon
GER_024.desc: A risky device that siphons field energy back into the user's reserves.

GER_030.name: Ashen Veil
GER_030.desc: A soot-threaded cloak worn by hunters who cross burning lands.

GER_031.name: Stormshroud
GER_031.effect: Prevents lightning storm damage in Volt grounds
GER_031.desc: A charged mantle woven with conductive silver threads that disperse violent surges.

GER_032.name: Frostmantle
GER_032.desc: A thick mantle crafted for hunters who move through merciless cold.

GER_033.name: Gloamwrap
GER_033.desc: A dim veil that dulls the pressure of suffocating darkness.

GER_034.name: Emberthread
GER_034.effect: +10% Mora spawn chance in Flame grounds
GER_034.desc: A heat-fed cloak that not only protects, but draws fire-aligned Mora nearer.

GER_040.name: Quakewalkers
GER_040.effect: Prevents earthquake knockdowns in Terra grounds
GER_040.desc: Heavy boots made to keep a hunter steady when the earth itself rebels.

GER_041.name: Riftwalk Greaves
GER_041.desc: Ancient greaves rumored to have walked through places no sane Lumorian would enter.

GER_042.name: Deeproot Treads
GER_042.desc: Boots that grip the ground like roots in restless soil.

GER_043.name: Tempest Striders
GER_043.effect: Immune to storm knockback, +10% hunt movement efficiency
GER_043.desc: Sky-forged boots for hunters who refuse to bow to the weather.

GER_044.name: Faultstride Boots
GER_044.desc: Measured, reinforced boots built for fractured paths and unstable terrain.

GER_050.name: Harmony Crest
GER_050.desc: A faction crest carried by Harmony Lumorians who walk the path of cleansing and balance.

GER_051.name: Purity Seal
GER_051.desc: A disciplined seal of the Purity Order, symbolizing command and restraint.

GER_052.name: Rift Mark
GER_052.desc: A mark worn by those who willingly step closer to the Rift's danger.

REL_001.name: Primordial Fragment
REL_001.desc: A fragment tied to the first disturbance that birthed Lumora's greatest mysteries.

REL_002.name: Vitality Relic
REL_002.desc: A relic dense with preserved life-force, prized by hunters who survive on the edge.

REL_003.name: Echo Relic
REL_003.effect: +15% rare Mora spawn chance, +10% hunting efficiency
REL_003.desc: An ancient relic that seems to resonate with faint traces of every Mora that passes nearby.

ITM_001.name: Minor Healing Capsule
ITM_001.desc: A small capsule filled with condensed vitality energy.

ITM_002.name: Major Healing Capsule
ITM_002.desc: A stronger high value healing capsule used before dangerous hunts.

ITM_016.name: Energy Capsule
ITM_016.desc: A capsule filled with concentrated energy to quickly restore your vitality.

ITM_003.name: Aura Stabilizer
ITM_003.desc: A delicate vial that helps recover scattered aura.

ITM_005.name: Stabilizer
ITM_005.desc: A trusted field item used to calm dangerous Mora instability.

ITM_006.name: Cleanse Shard
ITM_006.effect: Removes corrupted status from one Mora
ITM_006.desc: A polished shard infused with cleansing energy by Harmony artisans.

ITM_007.name: Lure Beacon
ITM_007.effect: +15% Mora spawn rate for one hunt
ITM_007.desc: A pulse beacon that attracts wandering Mora from the surrounding area.

ITM_008.name: Forbidden Mora Lure
ITM_008.effect: Forces an immediate Mora spawn in hunting zones
ITM_008.desc: A banned lure that emits an aggressive signal too tempting for nearby Mora to ignore.

ITM_009.name: Vital Core Crystal
ITM_009.desc: A condensed life crystal that permanently strengthens vitality.

ITM_010.name: Traveler's Satchel
ITM_010.desc: A reinforced satchel used by hunters who travel farther than most.

ITM_011.name: Expedition Pack
ITM_011.desc: A large expedition pack built for dangerous and extended journeys.

ITM_012.name: Dimensional Pouch
ITM_012.desc: A strange pouch rumored to contain compressed space inside.

ITM_013.name: Shadow Permit
ITM_013.effect: Grants temporary access to restricted black market stock
ITM_013.desc: A discreet permit exchanged in quiet corners by merchants who trust almost no one.

ITM_014.name: Capture Net
ITM_014.desc: A reinforced capture tool used by beginners and veterans alike.

ITM_015.name: Pulse Tonic
ITM_015.effect: Reduces environmental HP loss for one hunt
ITM_015.desc: A bitter tonic that helps the body endure harsh field conditions a little longer.

MAT_001.name: Rift Dust
MAT_001.desc: Fine residue gathered from unstable zones and Rift-touched surfaces.

MAT_002.name: Aura Crystal
MAT_002.desc: A crystal that stores lingering aura and is prized by artificers.

MAT_003.name: Mora Fang
MAT_003.desc: A trophy part used in advanced gear work and black market trades.

MAT_004.name: Purity Ash
MAT_004.desc: Refined ash used by the Purity Order in seals, marks, and strict rites.

MAT_005.name: Shadow Resin
MAT_005.desc: A dark substance used in black market tailoring and unstable bindings.

ACC_001.name: Black Market Pass
ACC_001.effect: Allows access to the Black Market
ACC_001.desc: A discreet pass traded among underground merchants and smugglers.

ACC_002.name: Vault Key
ACC_002.desc: A key whispered about in hidden circles, said to open deeper layers of forbidden trade.

SCR_001.name: Scroll of Purification
SCR_001.effect: Purifies one corrupted Mora or corruption event
SCR_001.desc: A sacred Harmony scroll that releases stabilizing light to cleanse corruption.

SCR_002.name: Scroll of Tranquility
SCR_002.desc: A calming script that tempers violence and steadies the flow of conflict.

SCR_003.name: Scroll of Renewal
SCR_003.effect: Restores 50 player HP and 30 active Mora HP
SCR_003.desc: A restorative Harmony text used after dangerous encounters.

SCR_004.name: Scroll of Spirit Bond
SCR_004.desc: A bonding scroll used by Harmony Lumorians to strengthen trust before capture.

SCR_005.name: Scroll of Aura Shield
SCR_005.effect: Prevents aura loss from one faint
SCR_005.desc: A protective script that cushions the spirit when the body collapses.

SCR_006.name: Scroll of Dominion
SCR_006.effect: Temporarily controls unstable Mora during battle
SCR_006.desc: A rigid command scroll used by the Purity Order to force obedience through will.

SCR_007.name: Scroll of Precision
SCR_007.desc: A sharp tactical script that refines execution and punishes carelessness.

SCR_008.name: Scroll of Command
SCR_008.effect: Forces Mora obedience while unstable for a short period
SCR_008.desc: A stern Purity script written to reinforce order when chaos starts breaking through.

SCR_009.name: Scroll of War Focus
SCR_009.desc: A battle-script that sharpens aggression and funnels intent into clean offense.

SCR_010.name: Scroll of Tactical Insight
SCR_010.effect: Reveals enemy Mora stats during battle
SCR_010.desc: A practical field scroll used by disciplined fighters who prefer knowledge over guesswork.

SCR_011.name: Scroll of Rift Surge
SCR_011.desc: A dangerous Rift text that pulls violent power closer at a cost.

SCR_012.name: Scroll of Corruption Pulse
SCR_012.effect: +20% corrupted Mora spawn chance for one hunt
SCR_012.desc: A pulse-script that agitates corrupted energy and draws unstable lifeforms nearer.

SCR_013.name: Scroll of Abyss Echo
SCR_013.desc: A dark resonance scroll that makes the unseen answer back.

SCR_014.name: Scroll of Rift Step
SCR_014.effect: Avoids environmental damage for one hunt
SCR_014.desc: A movement script used by those reckless enough to dance through danger.

SCR_015.name: Scroll of Void Channel
SCR_015.desc: A forbidden Rift scroll that pours raw unstable force into the user or Mora.

PURIFY_ORB.name: Orb of Purification
PURIFY_ORB.effect: Allows purification of corrupted Mora during wild battles. Base success ~40%.
PURIFY_ORB.desc: A sacred orb carried by every Harmony Lumorian. Its light wavers but never dies — the instrument of purification since the first Rift tear.

MUT_001.name: Mutation Shard
MUT_001.effect: Triggers a temporary mutation on a non-companion Mora. Lasts 1-2 battles.
MUT_001.desc: A crystallized fragment of unstable Rift energy. When applied to a Mora, it triggers a brief but powerful transformation.

MUT_002.name: Primal Catalyst
MUT_002.effect: Triggers a stronger mutation on a non-companion Mora. Lasts 2-3 battles.
MUT_002.desc: A volatile catalyst forged from deep Rift fissures. Triggers a more potent and longer-lasting mutation.

MUT_003.name: Bond Amplifier
MUT_003.desc: A resonance crystal that amplifies the bond between a Lumorian and their companion Mora.

CREATION_POWDER.name: Creation Powder
CREATION_POWDER.effect: Required to submit a new Mora design at Lumora Labs (.create-mora). Requires 15+ Intelligence to use.
CREATION_POWDER.desc: Glittering primordial dust — the raw material of creation itself. One pinch is enough to give form to a new Mora in the labs.

REOB.name: Reob
REOB.effect: Rift Seeker origin — use to forge a Mora at Lumora Labs (.create-mora). Grants +1% rarity boost per creation.
REOB.desc: A volatile sphere born from the fractured void itself, harvested by Rift Seekers from the deepest rifts. When channeled through the Creation Array, it channels primordial chaos into pure potential—the raw stuff of life itself.

CRY_001.name: Shard Crystal
CRY_001.desc: A rough fragment of stabilizing crystal. Used to reinforce faction strongholds.

CRY_002.name: Core Crystal
CRY_002.desc: A refined crystal with a dense, hardened core — strong enough to hold the shape of a wall under pressure.

CRY_003.name: Prismatic Crystal
CRY_003.desc: A multifaceted crystal that refracts incoming force across its structure. Highly prized by wall engineers.

CRY_004.name: Rift Crystal
CRY_004.desc: A crystal harvested from the heart of a Rift Surge. Contains the raw violence of the Rift itself — unmatched in defensive potential.

RES_001.name: Rift Escape Shard
RES_001.effect: Breaks free from raid capture. Single use.
RES_001.desc: A jagged shard that tears open a brief rift, pulling the holder out of captivity. Single-use — once consumed, the rift seals behind you.

SNATCH_GLOVE.name: Snatch Glove
SNATCH_GLOVE.effect: Lets you attempt .rob @user. Victim has 5 seconds to .defend. Consumed on use (success or fail).
SNATCH_GLOVE.desc: A scuffed leather glove laced with rift-thread. Quiet, but the silver tier — defenders see it coming.

SHADOW_GLOVE.name: Shadow Glove
SHADOW_GLOVE.effect: Faster snatch — victim has only 3 seconds to .defend. Consumed on use.
SHADOW_GLOVE.desc: Pro-grade glove woven from voidsilk. The defender feels nothing until you are already gone.

PHANTOM_GLOVE.name: Phantom Glove
PHANTOM_GLOVE.effect: Elite snatch — victim has only 2 seconds to .defend. Consumed on use.
PHANTOM_GLOVE.desc: Forbidden tool from the black market. Wearing one is a crime in Harmony lands. Wearing one is *expected* in Rift territory.

PROFILE_MASK.name: Veil Mask
PROFILE_MASK.effect: Hides your profile from .profile lookups by other players. Toggle off with .unmask.
PROFILE_MASK.desc: Crystalline filigree that scatters scrying. Wear it and your stats vanish from prying eyes.
